Description: Seed bundle groups for sync-hotfix-to-devices when runtime bundle chains are broader than manifest-only dependency closure.

chooserole.unity3d.WhyNeeded: Keep choose-role scene, choose-role UI, and runtime-shared material/shader bundles in one sync family because manifest-only closure does not fully capture the runtime lazy-load chain for choose-role visuals.
chooserole.unity3d.FailureIfMissing: Device hotfix rollout can load chooserole from the stable hotfix directory while shared material or shader bundles still fall back to base.apk, leaving choose-role background or foot-ground visuals inconsistent.

Evidence.Note: Shows chooserole, common_matss, and suit_shaderss loading from the stable 星辰战纪 hotfix directory.
Shows chooserole single-file sync expanding through bundle-group and manifest closure.

uichooserole.unity3d.WhyNeeded: Ensure choose-role UI sync also carries shared UI text/button bundles and the runtime-shared material/shader chain that becomes active after choose-role scene entry.
uichooserole.unity3d.FailureIfMissing: Choose-role UI can load from hotfix while downstream shared UI or visual dependency bundles still come from base.apk, making the scene and UI stack diverge during the same flow.

Evidence.Note: Shows uichooserole loading from the stable 星辰战纪 hotfix directory during choose-role entry.
Shows uichooserole being expanded by bundle-group and manifest closure from a chooserole sync request.
